simulations.name: PersonalEscrowVault.lockForBid
simulations.description: Lock 25 USDC + $1 convenience fee for buyer bid. Uses Chainlink Data Feeds price gate.

simulations.name: CREVerifier.computeQualityScoreFromParams
simulations.description: On-chain 7-gate CRE quality scoring: TCPA freshness + geo + data integrity + params + source
simulations.note: Pure view call — no gas consumed. Score breakdown: TCPA(3000) + Geo(2000) + DataIntegrity(2000) + Params(1600) + Source(1000) = 9600/10000

simulations.name: LeadNFTv2.mintLead
simulations.description: Mint Lead NFT with full metadata. Protected by ACE runPolicy modifier (PolicyEngine checks compliance before execution).

simulations.name: VRFTieBreaker.requestResolution
simulations.description: Request VRF v2.5 randomness to break a 3-way auction tie. Winner = randomWord % 3.
simulations.note: On VNet, VRF coordinator may not deliver callback (requires live VRF subscription). Request is recorded on-chain.

simulations.name: PersonalEscrowVault.performUpkeep
simulations.description: Chainlink Automation upkeep: Proof-of-Reserves verification + sweep expired bid locks (>7 days). Action type 3 = both.

simulations.name: BountyMatcher.requestBountyMatch
simulations.description: Request Chainlink Functions DON to evaluate bounty pool criteria against lead attributes.
simulations.note: On VNet, Functions router may not deliver callback. Request is recorded on-chain.

simulations.name: ACECompliance.getUserCompliance + verifyKYC
simulations.description: ACE compliance registry: verify KYC for buyer, then read on-chain compliance status.
